requirements.summary: Revert the entire frontend to Version 9 state, removing all changes from Versions 10+
acceptanceCriteria: The application code matches Version 9 exactly in terms of features, pages, components, and frontend logic.
No code, styles, animations, or UI changes introduced after Version 9 are present.
All pages and routes that existed in Version 9 render correctly.
All pages and features added after Version 9 are removed.
The frontend reflects only the components, pages, and styles present in Version 9.
Immutable paths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui) remain unchanged.

file_operations.description: CRITICAL: This plan cannot be executed without Version 9 source code or git history. Manual steps required: 1) Identify Version 9 commit hash from git history, 2) Review git diff between Version 9 and current version, 3) Identify all files that existed in Version 9, 4) Restore each file to its Version 9 state using git checkout or manual restoration, 5) Remove any files that did not exist in Version 9, 6) Verify all routes, components, and pages match Version 9 exactly. Without access to Version 9's actual code, this automated plan cannot specify exact changes. The BuildRequest requires exact replication of Version 9, which is impossible without the source material.

Restore global styles, CSS custom properties, and Tailwind configuration to match Version 9 exactly. Remove any theme variables, animations, or styling additions made after Version 9. Requires comparison with Version 9 source.
Restore Tailwind configuration to Version 9 state, removing any custom colors, fonts, animations, or theme extensions added after Version 9. Requires comparison with Version 9 source.
